name: workflow state contract validator rejects an architect decision missing the required selected field
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","architect_session":{"decisions":[{"id":"d1","options_presented":["a"]}]}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check architect-session 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*selected' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
